channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Amit Shah reviews port security plan and unveils smart border vision
item.description: The article discusses the announcement by Union Home Minister Amit Shah regarding the review of the Port Security Bureau (PSB) and the unveiling of a four-pronged 'Smart Border Vision' to enhance nati...

item.title: World Cup 2026 Injury Updates: Key Players Miss Key Matches
item.description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup has seen a wave of significant injuries affecting key players across multiple teams, impacting match outcomes and team strategies. Kylian Mbappe, France's star forward, suffere...

item.title: Former GOP Strategist Warns of MAGA's Midterm Challenges and Democratic Strategy
item.description: Rick Wilson, a former Republican strategist, warns in his Substack post that the MAGA movement lacks the capability to win a fair election due to President Trump's declining popularity, economic insta...

item.title: Political Tensions Escalate: BJP Criticizes NC Over 2010 Killings Amid Kashmir Statehood Debates
item.description: National Conference president Farooq Abdullah invited 52 politicians to join a July 20 protest in Delhi demanding Jammu & Kashmir's statehood restoration. Hurriyat Conference chairman Mirwaiz Umar Far...

item.title: SPAR yoghurt recall: Consumers advised to check batch numbers and expiry dates
item.description: The National Consumer Commission (NCC) has issued a recall for specific SPAR yoghurt products due to safety concerns. Consumers are urged to stop consuming affected batches immediately and verify if t...

item.title: Indian Police Respond to Protests Following Rape and Murder of 11-Year-Old Girl
item.description: The article details the violent protests that erupted in India following the rape and murder of an 11-year-old girl, leading to the arrest of dozens of individuals by police. The incident has sparked ...

item.title: Key Philippine News: Impeachment Denial, Diplomatic Stance, and School Reopening
item.description: The article highlights several key news stories from the Philippines and around the world. First, the Sandiganbayan court rejected Senator Jinggoy Estrada's request to attend the impeachment trial of ...

item.title: Tanzania Unveils Strategies to Boost Tourism Sector
item.description: The Tanzania Tourist Board convened key stakeholders in Arusha to strengthen partnerships and enhance the country's position in the global tourism market. The Destination Tanzania Stakeholders Forum 2...

item.title: Iran Targets US Military Sites in Gulf States Amid Ceasefire Tensions
item.description: Iran has launched attacks on US military infrastructure in Kuwait, Qatar, and Bahrain following recent US strikes on Iranian targets. The conflict, which has strained a three-week-old ceasefire agreem...

item.title: Emmanuel Wanyonyi Sets New 1000m World Record at Monaco Diamond League
item.description: Emmanuel Wanyonyi, a Kenyan athlete renowned for his success in the 800m race, made history by breaking the men's 1000m world record during the Monaco Diamond League. The event took place on Friday ev...

item.title: Former GOP operative warns CNN to fire Scott Jennings over McConnell claims
item.description: A former Republican strategist, Cheri Jacobus, has publicly demanded that CNN fire conservative commentator Scott Jennings if his allegations about Senator Mitch McConnell are proven false. The contro...

item.title: Bayeux Tapestry Arrives in London, Symbolizing UK-France Historical Tribute
item.description: The Bayeux Tapestry, a 1000-year-old artwork depicting the Norman Conquest of 1066, has arrived in London after being transported from France via a police-guarded, climate-controlled truck through the...

item.title: Ruling Party and Opposition Announce Political Agreement in Zanzibar
item.description: The ruling party Chama Cha Mapinduzi (CCM) and the opposition ACT Wazalendo have officially announced a landmark political agreement in Zanzibar, marking a significant shift in the archipelago’s often...

item.title: Delta Police Arraign Community Leaders Over Assault and Public Flogging Incident
item.description: The Delta State Police Area Command in Ozoro has arraigned the Chairman of Emevor Community, Lucky Okeremu, alongside two other community leaders, for public flogging and assault of resident Ogaga God...

item.title: School Bus Accident in Kabarnet-Marigat Injures 56 Learners and Teachers
item.description: A school bus transporting 56 students and four teachers from AIC Lomut Secondary School in West Pokot crashed on Kabarnet-Marigat Road on Friday evening. Emergency services rushed the injured to Barin...

item.title: Homemade Caramel Popcorn Recipe Using Simple Pantry Ingredients
item.description: This article provides a detailed guide on creating homemade caramel popcorn using basic pantry ingredients. The recipe emphasizes the importance of cooking the caramel to the correct stage and evenly ...

item.title: South African Man Arrested for Triple Murder Near Bedford
item.description: South African police have arrested a 42-year-old Zimbabwean national, Notthabo Zandile Tshuma, on suspicion of murdering his wife and two daughters near Bedford. The victims, Natalie (15) and Nala (fi...

item.title: Zamfara Police Rescues INEC Staff, Recover Stolen Cattle in Security Operations
item.description: The Zamfara State Police Command, in partnership with military forces, executed successful operations in Gummi, Talata Mafara, and Gusau Local Government Areas, rescuing an abducted INEC staff member,...

item.title: Angus Taylor Criticizes One Nation's Economic Plans as Modi's Melbourne Visit Attracts Crowds
item.description: The article details Angus Taylor's recent speech criticizing One Nation's economic policies, highlighting their potential trillion-dollar costs over a decade. Taylor dismissed Pauline Hanson's party a...

item.title: 50-Year-Old Unsolved Murder of 14-Year-Old Halifax Girl
item.description: A 14-year-old girl from Halifax, Nova Scotia, was murdered in 1976, and the case remains unsolved despite extensive investigations. The victim, whose identity has not been officially disclosed, was la...
